---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include API design if relevant:

```php
// Example of how you'd like to use it
Agent::make()->yourNewMethod()->run('task');
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've considered?

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
